---
title: "synapse_sync.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\.agents\scripts\synapse_sync.py"
loc: 276
complexity: 41
logic_score: 0.72
style_score: 3.83
intel_score: 4.30
overall_score: 1.69
---

## Intent
The `synapse_sync.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on SovereignHUD, box_top, box_row, box_bottom, log, ConfigurationError, PushRateLimiter, __init__, _get_host, _load, _save, check, record, GitHelper, __init__, run, check_permissions, KnowledgeExtractor, __init__, extract_all, _extract_corrections, _extract_patterns, Synapse, __init__, _load_config, _resolve_core, pull, _sync_skills, _sync_corrections, push, main. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SovereignHUD, box_top, box_row, box_bottom, log, ConfigurationError, PushRateLimiter, __init__, _get_host, _load, _save, check, record, GitHelper, __init__, run, check_permissions, KnowledgeExtractor, __init__, extract_all, _extract_corrections, _extract_patterns, Synapse, __init__, _load_config, _resolve_core, pull, _sync_skills, _sync_corrections, push, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [shutil](file://shutil)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [scripts.ui](file://scripts.ui)
- [socket](file://socket)
- [scripts.synapse_auth](file://scripts.synapse_auth)
- [argparse](file://argparse)

### Exports
- `SovereignHUD`
- `box_top`
- `box_row`
- `box_bottom`
- `log`
- `ConfigurationError`
- `PushRateLimiter`
- `__init__`
- `_get_host`
- `_load`
- `_save`
- `check`
- `record`
- `GitHelper`
- `__init__`
- `run`
- `check_permissions`
- `KnowledgeExtractor`
- `__init__`
- `extract_all`
- `_extract_corrections`
- `_extract_patterns`
- `Synapse`
- `__init__`
- `_load_config`
- `_resolve_core`
- `pull`
- `_sync_skills`
- `_sync_corrections`
- `push`
- `main`
